# Titan Fishing Fan Site

> Titan Fishing (Câu Cá Vạn Cân) is a deep-sea fishing adventure game on Roblox. This fan site provides game guides, working redeem codes, and tips for new and experienced players. Available in English and Vietnamese.

## Core Pages

- [Home (English)](https://titanfishing.org/): Game overview, features, how to play, and FAQ for Titan Fishing on Roblox.
- [Home (Vietnamese)](https://titanfishing.org/vi/): Trang chủ tiếng Việt — giới thiệu game Câu Cá Vạn Cân, hướng dẫn chơi và FAQ.
- [Codes (English)](https://titanfishing.org/codes/): All working Titan Fishing redeem codes for 2026 — free money, rod skins, Mythical Books, and luck boosts.
- [Codes (Vietnamese)](https://titanfishing.org/vi/codes/): Tất cả code Câu Cá Vạn Cân còn hoạt động năm 2026 — tiền miễn phí, skin cần câu, Sách Huyền Thoại.
- [Skill Tier List (English)](https://titanfishing.org/skills/): All 19 ranked Titan Fishing skills — damage, cooldown, and combo guide.
- [Skill Tier List (Vietnamese)](https://titanfishing.org/vi/skills/): Danh sách xếp hạng 19 kỹ năng Câu Cá Vạn Cân — sát thương, cooldown và hướng dẫn combo.

## Active Codes (as of March 2026)

- SORRY2026 — 1 Shark Rod Skin + 1 Mythical Book
- 1MVISITS — 50,000 free in-game money
- 50KMONEY — 50,000 free in-game money
- MYTHICAL — 1 Mythical Book
- 30XLUCK2026 — 30x Luck Boost
- BIGSHARK26 — Big Shark Rod Skin
- QUALITY4MVISITS — Exclusive 4M visits reward
- NEWERA2026 — Exclusive New Era reward

## About the Game

Titan Fishing is a free-to-play Roblox game featuring deep-sea boss battles, rod upgrades, skill books, and 5+ explorable islands. Players cast lines, fight sea creatures in real-time combat, and unlock powerful abilities through Mythical Books.
